zh.Hessett, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可賀瑟特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen Bacon於大約1399年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可賀瑟特時，他的父親William Bacon De Bavant23歲，母親Isabel Shelton11397歲。他和Margaret De Thorpe至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於大約1455年在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.Hessett, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可賀瑟特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen Bacon于大约1399年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可賀瑟特时，他的父亲William Bacon De Bavant23岁，母亲Isabel Shelton11397岁。他和Margaret De Thorpe至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于大约1455年在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bacon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from the Norman French personal name Bacun, derived from the ancient Germanic name Bac(c)o, Bahho, based on the element bag ‘(to) fight, (to) dispute’. The name was relatively common among the Normans in the form Bacus, of which the oblique case was Bacon.

English and French: from Middle English, Old French bacun, bacon ‘bacon’ (a word of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Back 3), probably a metonymic occupational name for a preparer and seller of cured pork.

History: Gilles Bacon from Normandy, France, is documented in Quebec City, QC, in 1647. — Michael Bacon from England arrived in Dedham, MA, in 1640. Nathanial Bacon, from Stratton, Cornwall, arrived in Barnstaple, MA, in 1639. Another Nathaniel Bacon (1647–76), from Friston Hall, Suffolk, emigrated to VA and settled at Curl's Neck on the James river.

variants.name: Bagg
meanings: from Middle English bagge ‘bag, pack, bundle’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of bags and sacks of various kinds, including wallets and purses. It might also have been used for a beggar, or for one who carried their belongings in a bag.
from the ancient Germanic personal name Bago (Bac(c)o, Bahho), from the root bag- ‘to fight’ (see Bacon 2).

variants.name: Back
meanings: English (Devon, Kent, Sussex, and Norfolk): from the Middle English personal name Bakke (Old English Bacca). It is of uncertain origin, but may have been a byname in the same sense as 3.
English: nickname from Middle English bakke ‘bat’, of uncertain application, perhaps a nickname for a person with poor eyesight, from the expression ‘blind as a bat’.

English: from Middle English bakke ‘back’ (Old English bæc), hence a nickname for someone with a hunched back or some other noticeable peculiarity of the back or spine, or a topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or ridge, or at the rear of a settlement.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen Bacon was born about 1399, in Hessett, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bacon De Bavant, was 23 and his mother, Isabel Shelton, was 11397. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Margaret De Thorpe. He died about 1455, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen Bacon est né environ 1399, à Hessett, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bacon De Bavant, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel Shelton, avait 11397 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Margaret De Thorpe. Il est décédé environ 1455, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen Bacon um 1399 in Hessett, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bacon De Bavant 23 und seine Mutter Isabel Shelton 11397. Er hatte mit Margaret De Thorpe mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1455 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Bacon è nato il circa 1399 nel Hessett, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Bacon De Bavant, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Shelton, aveva 11397 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Margaret De Thorpe. Morì circa 1455, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.Hessett, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクヘセット
ja.lifeSummary: Stephen Baconが約1399年にイギリスイギリススフォルクヘセットで生まれた時，父William Bacon De Bavantは23歳，母Isabel Sheltonは11397歳であった。彼はMargaret De Thorpeとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1455年に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Bacon(이)가 대략 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bacon De Bavant(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Shelton(은)는 11397세였다. 그는 Margaret De Thorpe(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1455년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Margaret De Thorpe. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1455, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.
